Description.English:
A purified drop of Atlantideum, refined to its very essence. This precious material is acquired by earning favour with and assisting the Autophage<>.

Visit the Autophage Synthesis Terminal found at all Autophage camps to exchange Void Motes for unique customisation options.
Description.SimplifiedChinese:
一滴净化的亚特拉迪姆，纯粹至极。这种珍贵材料可通过帮助自噬体<>并赢得其好感获得。

前往所有自噬体营地都有的自噬体合成终端，用虚空微粒交换独特的自定义选项。
Description.TraditionalChinese:
一滴純化的亞特蘭提德鋼，精煉至極致的精華。協助自噬<>並贏得他們的青睞，即可獲得此珍貴材料。

前往所有自噬營地都可找到的自噬合成終端站，即可用虛空微塵交換獨特客製化選項。
Description.USEnglish:
A purified drop of Atlantideum, refined to its very essence. This precious material is acquired by earning favor with and assisting the Autophage<>.

Visit the Autophage Synthesis Terminal found at all Autophage camps to exchange Void Motes for unique customisation options.

PinObjectiveTip.English:
Tainted Metal is an unusually soft and porous metal, found in the wrecks of derelict freighters.

Locate derelicts with the use of an Emergency Signal Scanner, purchaseable from a Space Station Scrap Dealer.
PinObjectiveTip.SimplifiedChinese:
污染的金属是一种异常柔软的多孔金属，发现于荒废货船的残骸中。

使用从空间站废品收购者处购买的紧急信号扫描仪定位荒废的货船。
PinObjectiveTip.TraditionalChinese:
遭汙染的金屬是一種異常柔軟且多孔洞的金屬，可在廢棄貨船的殘骸中找到。

使用緊急訊號掃描器找到棄船，接收器可向太空站上的廢料商人購買。

PinObjectiveMessage.English:
Find Tainted Metal in the wrecks of deep-space derelict freighters
Locate derelicts with an Emergency Signal Scanner
PinObjectiveMessage.SimplifiedChinese:
在位于深空的荒废货船中寻找污染的金属
使用紧急信号扫描仪定位太空残骸
PinObjectiveMessage.TraditionalChinese:
在深空廢棄貨船的殘骸中找到遭汙染的金屬
使用緊急訊號掃描器找到棄船
